name: showLessonReview
description: Show one short, factual previous-lesson recap with separate What went well and Check again bullet lists. Call at most once, only from reliable history, and never turn it into a review loop.

parameters.description: The previous lesson name or a short factual recap title.
Zero to four concise facts about concepts the learner understood or handled well. One point per line. Use only reliable history; never invent praise.
Zero to four concise concepts that need another look. One point per line. Use only reliable knowledge gaps or practice recommendations; never invent difficulties.
